AboutUs.title: About Us
AboutUs.subtitle: Meet Trackifly, the platform that connects people with their shipments.
AboutUs.historyP1: Trackifly was born from the need to simplify parcel logistics for people. From the very beginning, we focused on making every shipment a simple, reliable and transparent experience.
AboutUs.historyP2: Today we are a platform that manages multiple shipments simultaneously, connecting users with their packages in real time, regardless of the quantity or destination.
AboutUs.missionDesc: To facilitate the sending of multiple packages to any destination, providing our users with a simple, fast and fully trackable logistics experience.
AboutUs.visionDesc: To become the most reliable multi-parcel platform in Latin America, transforming the way people manage their shipments.

values.title: Transparency
values.desc: Every package has real-time tracking. No surprises, no uncertainty.

values.title: Reliability
values.desc: We are committed to every shipment as if it were our own.

values.title: Simplicity
values.desc: Managing multiple packages has to be easy. That's Trackifly.

values.title: Closeness
values.desc: We are available to help you at every step of the process.

values.title: Innovation
values.desc: We constantly improve our platform to give you the best experience.

AboutUs.ctaSubtitle: Sign up for free and manage all your shipments from one place.
